entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,522Chapters: 2/7Kudos: 39

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.

entry.title: Under/Over Him
entry.summary:
Author: Neffectual

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,636Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 77

Summary: When Dick says some things that Violet can't put up with any longer, she asks Selina for a safe place to stay. Turns out, the owner of that place wanted to see how Jason Todd had grown up. He hadn't expected Violet, but that doesn't mean she's an unpleasant surprise.

entry.title: red at the bone
entry.summary:
Author: badalice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,050Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 69

Summary: Under the aegis of the Order of St. George, the House of Wayne has silently protected the children of Gotham from the monsters that stalk them for nearly two decades. Its members live dangerous, lonely lives, guardians of a secret that the Order will kill to keep safe. When Dick Grayson's estranged brother Jason Todd resurfaces in small town Kansas, on the trail of one of the most dangerous types of monsters the Order hunts and kills, House Dragon Bruce Wayne sends Dick to assist—and, just maybe, to bring Jason back into the fold. Some wounds, though, run too deep, and some promises lie too broken, and Dick knows all too well the welcome that he'll receive if he goes—but when it comes to Jason, he'll do whatever it takes.

entry.title: Punishments
entry.summary:
Author: hggretsuko

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,351Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 28

Summary: Jason is a brat, he loves his free time so he'd skip school. But he's a smart kid,he doesn't need to study much to keep his grades.. even if sometimes he couldn't keep his bratty mouth shut. Semester's reports are close, the family will have to see his reports card. Surely he'll be fine, right? he's smart afterall.

entry.title: Sick for You
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,736Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 50

Summary: John lost his scholarship, but he can't tell his parents — his pride won't let him. There's only one option: find a job. As a joke, he tosses his resume into the restaurant he only goes to for a chance to catch a glimpse of the guy of his dreams. They hire him. But not as a waiter. Now he sees his "object of affection" up close every single day — and every single day, he hears him curse in Arabic. Also, John is pretty sure he's about to get diabetes.

entry.title: We Can't See the Skyline
entry.summary:
Author: Rawrbin

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,171Chapters: 21/25Kudos: 840

Summary: Jason Todd is a struggling college student, part-time mechanic, and full-time closeted homosexual, just trying to get by in Park Row. When he needs a roommate in order to pay the bills, fate delivers him Dick Grayson, a charming man with a mysterious past. Jason suspects they may have more in common than they can speak out loud. Will he be able to keep their roommate relationship platonic? And what is Dick Grayson's real history?

entry.title: Held Without Ropes
entry.summary:
Author: batsandbees

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,549Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: Dick bared his teeth, barely holding back his response. He couldn't afford to piss Jason off any further than he already had. It wasn't worth it. Eventually Jason would get bored and let them go. Or he'd slip up and they'd escape. One way or another, it would be over soon enough. They just had to get through it.

entry.title: Carbon Dioxide
entry.summary:
Author: Autumn_Bitters (Winterlynne_Norvic)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,506Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 79

Summary: “Good patrol?” Jason asks an eon later. Dick nods. “Uneventful.” A word that is synonymous with safe in their line of work. “My red slushy was kind of nasty.” Jason snorts and Dick can’t help but grin himself. There’s an air of ridiculousness when they skirt around the topic of Dick’s appetite. “Had something to wash it down with later in the night.” Nodding along, Jason finally comes to the last of his tasks, with only the pot still cooking away on the stove. He takes a moment to be still before replying. “Cherry isn’t my preferred slushy either.” Ironic to Dick, when Jason smells of cherries himself. “Too artificial, ” He continues. “Fresh ones you can bite into are always better.” He says it with a wry grin, and there, Dick is inclined to agree. He tilts his head, “You know,” He starts, although he’s never mentioned it to Jason before. “You smell like black cherries to me. Tart ones.” His tongue runs along the inside of his teeth as they itch with that familiar curiosity. Never ache, never thirst. Just itch. … Vamprism isn’t a choice Dick got to make, but Jason and Damian prove to Dick there’s value in being among the undead and resurrected.

entry.title: Shot Through the Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SaviouroftheStars

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,142Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 156

Summary: Jason Todd died once. It didn’t stick. Now a revenant with a stuttering heartbeat and a soul that won’t stay buried, he hunts the things that crawl out of the dark. But nothing he’s fought, not demons, not ghosts, not monsters wearing human skin, comes close to the pair now stalking the hunter circuit. They’re carving through veteran hunters like wheat. One is a towering brute in a mask.The other is a beautiful, shackled young man whose presence feels like gravity—quiet, strange, and impossible to ignore. Every instinct Jason has screams danger. Something about him feels ancient, bound, wrong. And yet Jason can’t look away. He’s going to have to kill them both. He just wishes the pretty one wasn’t making the job so damn complicated.

entry.title: Beyond the grave into the nest
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,190Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Jason had been cleaning every inch of his apartment all day—not only because it was spring cleaning time, but because bunny mating season was approaching. It meant Dick was going to be the insensible, horny animal he was born to be for at least a week straight. Jason had been Dick’s partner for the past five years. It could’ve happened sooner if he and Bruce hadn’t been having a cold war—or if he’d never died—but what happened, happened. At least they had each other now, and Jason had been the happiest he’d ever been these past five years. But this year was about more than just loving Dick through his most vulnerable moments. This year, this spring, this very fucking week, Jason was going to propose. The thought churned his stomach, dampened his palms, and caused his knees to shake—feelings he thought he’d abandoned as a teenager having wet dreams about Dick’s cleavage.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,938Chapters: 5/16Kudos: 277

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: bunny, oh bunny (isn't it funny?)
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,833Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: He'd felt so exposed, sitting here like it was a normal day and that he wasn't splayed out on Jason's lap in front of a mirror. There’s a pressure building up, an overwhelm that Dick didn’t really know how or what to do about. He’d never hated the fact that he was so close to getting relief just to have it stopped every time he went to move even the slightest bit.“Jay," Dick gasps, "Jay, c'mon-"“Stop talking,” Jason replies and it’s cold—some might even say it was cruel in its tone—but Dick knows better. He feels Jason, he knows Jason want to do more because every time Dick moves ever so slightly Jason throbs; it’s really just a battle of who would break first. Would it be Dick, the certified brat, or Jason, the certified brat tamer? Nobody really knew and, when you're dealing with two of the most competitive people this side of New Jersey, it was like waiting for a bomb to drop.or: my piece for the Grayson Gets Hooded Bunnywing Special and a scene in my brain from an office inspired AU that I haven't gotten around to writing but wanted this specific scene out of my brain because why the hell not?

entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,839Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 1,384

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.
